verbatim_quote: And so when I had this realization a while back, I tried to sketch it out and it seemed to me like LLMs are like a new operating system, right? So the LLM is a new a computer.
gloss: [ANALOGY] And so when I had this realization a while back, I tried to sketch it out and it seemed to me like LLMs are like a new operating system, right? So the LLM is a new a computer.
